description: Inspired by the sailors, nautica Blue for men has strong aquatic traces. Reminiscent of stylish evenings in the city, this Eau De Toilette, bottled in a delectable blue flask, has top notes of lavender, juniper and pink pepper with floral and subtle woodsy tones. Quantity: 100 ml Caution Flammable Keep away from sources of ignition Keep away from children Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying near the eyes
